reasoning: Cycle 13 is in mid-phase (6-15) which requires self-tuning hooks per evolution rules. We have infrastructure (self_reader, state_tracker, code_analyzer, output_validator) but no component that analyzes evolution outcomes to inform future cycles. This cycle_optimizer.py analyzes success/failure patterns in evolution.jsonl (identifying json_failed and incomplete_plan recurrences), correlates with codebase health metrics (file sizes, documentation coverage), and generates tuning parameters for improver.py integration. The module integrates with existing self_reader.py to avoid duplicating evolution parsing logic, exports machine-readable tuning profiles for /opt/minimax/bin/improver.py integration, and provides both human-readable summaries and JSON outputs.
